name: The Pallid Mask
intro_text: Beneath the streets of Paris lies the largest ossuary in the world. Six million dead rest in these tunnels.

The Mysterious Stranger told you to follow the pallid mask — that the answer you seek is underground. What you find instead are tunnels that do not appear on any map, branching and folding into geometries that should not exist.
The dead are watching. And something ahead is wearing a mask.
setup_instructions: Investigators begin at the Gate to Hell.
Shuffle all catacomb locations and create a face-down grid — they are revealed as investigators explore.
The Ghoul Priest from The Gathering enters play if the investigators were defeated in scenario 1.
Place 1 Catacomb Ghoul (03255) per investigator in the tunnels.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — The pallid mask is found
text: At the deepest point of the catacombs, you find it: an ivory mask that should not exist. It fits no human face, and yet you understand — this is the key.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators found the pallid mask. Each investigator earns 2 bonus XP.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — You surfaced empty-handed
text: You found the way out. That is enough for tonight.
The mask is still down there, somewhere in the dark.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators escaped without the mask.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Lost in the catacombs
text: The tunnels rearrange themselves. You wander for hours. When you finally emerge, you are in a part of Paris you do not recognise — and several days have passed.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were lost in the catacombs. Each investigator gains 1 physical and 1 mental trauma.*
